metadata.description: Local Lazyday coding workflow plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: lazyday-coding
plugins.description: Chinese coding workflows for planning, implementation, debugging, review, verification, and Git handoff.

plugins.name: lazyday-vault
plugins.description: Chinese personal knowledge vault workflows for source capture, raw preservation, source extraction, knowledge integration, interaction capture, conflict handling, retrieval, research, and retrospectives.

plugins.name: lazyday-worldcup
plugins.description: World Cup match and Sporttery forecasting workflows for current fixtures, upset risk, portfolios, and champion predictions.
